source_pr.title: store/helper: use random server port in test
source_pr.body:
<!--

-->

### What problem does this PR solve? <!--add issue link with summary if exists-->

Fixes #14986

### What is changed and how it works?

Use random server port
### Check List <!--REMOVE the items that are not applicable-->

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

 - Unit test

symptoms: PR body: use random server port for the test instead of fixed 127.0.0.1:10100.
failure_signature: PR body: use random server port for the test instead of fixed 127.0.0.1:10100.
fix_pattern: store/helper: use random server port in test

evidence: evidence: PR body: use random server port for the test instead of fixed 127.0.0.1:10100.
evidence: diff replaces fixed-port http.Server with `httptest.NewServer` and uses returned URL to avoid port collision (store/helper/helper_test.go).
